notes: Live data (price, mcap, liquidity, volume, chart, buy/sell) is resolved automatically from token.contractAddress via the DexScreener token endpoint — the highest-liquidity pair is picked automatically.
dex.dexscreenerPairAddress is optional — only set it if you want to pin one specific pair instead of auto-selecting the top one.
Set social.twitter to your X profile URL to activate that icon; it stays hidden until filled in.
